description: Style NoteYou'll catch every passing eye with this beautiful bracelet from pitaraa. The subtle design in white metal adds a sophisticated touch, while the gold colour provides an exquisite sheen. Wear it for that special day and get the mood just right with this piece!Product DetailsTwelve strands of gold colour beads curved to form a bracelet and an opening that can be stretched to slide the hand throughMaterial and CareWhite metalPolish with soft cloth to maintain shine and keep away dust and dirtSizeDiameter of bracelet: 6 cm
